items.name: card-wave
items.title: Card Wave
items.description: A tastefull svg with interactive hover effects to make the boring cards interesting

props.name: cardWidth
props.description: The width of the card

props.name: defaultHoverIndex
props.description: The index of the wave to hover by default

props.name: numCards
props.description: The number of cards to have in the card wave

props.name: startX
props.description: The starting x position of the wave

props.name: startY
props.description: The starting y position of the wave

items.name: diff-viewer
items.title: Diff Viewer
items.description: A lightweight compound diff code block for landing pages with responsive before/after panels, inherited inline marks, and customizable syntax highlighting rules.

props.name: children
props.description: Compose with DiffPanel children to define the before and after panes

props.name: filename
props.description: Optional file label rendered in the header, like a code block title

props.name: highlightRules
props.description: Tokenizer rules used to automatically syntax-highlight text children inside DiffLine

props.name: panes
props.description: The number of panes your diff will have. Useful when creating inline diff-view

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes applied to the outer diff viewer container

subComponents.name: DiffPanel
subComponents.description: One side of the diff. On mobile the panels stack vertically; from md upwards they render side by side.

props.name: children
props.description: Diff lines for a single side of the comparison

props.name: side
props.description: Logical panel side used for composition and semantics

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes for the panel wrapper

subComponents.name: DiffLine
subComponents.description: A single diff row. Automatically highlights text children and provides add/del state to nested DiffMark elements.

props.name: children
props.description: Line content. Plain text is tokenized automatically; nested DiffMark stays precise.

props.name: type
props.description: Controls line chrome, sign, and inherited mark styling

props.name: number
props.description: Optional line number displayed in the gutter

props.name: highlightRules
props.description: Optional per-line override for syntax highlighting rules

props.name: disableHighlighting
props.description: Disables automatic syntax highlighting for that line

props.name: className
props.description: Custom classes for the line wrapper

subComponents.name: DiffMark
subComponents.description: Inline changed fragment. Inherits add/del state from the parent DiffLine and lets you color the inner text directly with className.

props.name: children
props.description: The exact changed text or nested content to emphasize

props.name: className
props.description: Classes applied to the inner text inside the highlighted mark

props.name: markClassName
props.description: Optional classes for the outer highlighted wrapper

items.name: editable-heading
items.title: Editable Heading
items.description: An interactive heading styled as a text field that reveals a formatting toolbar on click. Supports bold, italic, underline, alignment, and font size controls. Inspired by Kree8's landing page design.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content displayed in the heading

props.name: defaultBold
props.description: Initial bold state

props.name: defaultItalic
props.description: Initial italic state

props.name: defaultUnderline
props.description: Initial underline state

props.name: defaultAlign
props.description: Initial text alignment

props.name: defaultFontSize
props.description: Initial font size

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the trigger button

items.name: floating-navbar
items.title: Floating Navbar
items.description: A reusable floating navigation bar with preserved motion behavior, array-driven links, and flexible brand configuration for logo or text.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of link objects used to render desktop and mobile navigation

props.name: brand
props.description: Brand configuration supporting logo, text, or custom brand content

props.name: callToAction
props.description: Optional desktop CTA button and matching mobile CTA link

props.name: leadingSlot
props.description: Optional node rendered before the CTA area

props.name: trailingSlot
props.description: Optional node rendered after the CTA area

subComponents.name: FloatingNavbarBrandLogo
subComponents.description: Renders brand logo with optional dark mode source

props.name: src
props.description: Primary logo source

props.name: darkSrc
props.description: Optional dark mode logo source

props.name: alt
props.description: Accessible logo description

subComponents.name: FloatingNavbarBrandText
subComponents.description: Renders brand text when no logo is used

props.name: children
props.description: Brand copy rendered in the navbar

items.name: hero-background
items.title: Hero Background
items.description: An animated glow-and-stars backdrop you can drop into any relative container to build cinematic landing sections.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Accent color used across the ambient glow layers.

props.name: glowOpacity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the moving glow bloom.

props.name: starOpacity
props.description: Sets the visibility of the dotted star field overlay.

props.name: starSize
props.description: Adjusts the spacing of the dot pattern used as stars.

props.name: motionSpeed
props.description: Speeds up or slows down the ambient glow animation.

props.name: animated
props.description: Disables motion while keeping the static background visible.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional classes for the absolutely positioned background wrapper.

items.name: linear-card
items.title: Linear Card
items.description: A compound feature card inspired by Linear's design language. Supports image and reactive SVG content variants with a minimal, editorial layout.

props.name: children
props.description: Card content - compose with the sub-components below

props.name: isLast
props.description: When true, removes the right border so the last card in a row sits flush

subComponents.name: LinearCardHeader
subComponents.description: Mono micro-label displayed above the card media. Hidden on mobile

props.name: children
props.description: Header label text, e.g. "FIG 0.1"

subComponents.name: LinearCardHeading
subComponents.description: Primary heading inside the card body

props.name: children
props.description: Heading text

subComponents.name: LinearCardSubheading
subComponents.description: Muted description text inside the card body

props.name: children
props.description: Subheading text

subComponents.name: LinearCardBody
subComponents.description: Wrapper for heading + subheading. Provides vertical flex layout and small text size

props.name: children
props.description: Body content - typically heading and subheading

subComponents.name: LinearCardImageContainer
subComponents.description: Fixed-size container for an image (relative positioned for next/image fill)

props.name: children
props.description: An or element

subComponents.name: LinearCardSVGContainer
subComponents.description: Fixed-size container for an SVG graphic with overflow hidden

props.name: children
props.description: An SVG element or reactive SVG component

items.name: terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: A procedural terminal playback component with typed commands, line-by-line output reveals, optional in-view start, and macOS, Windows, and Linux window variants.

props.name: commands
props.description: Commands typed into the terminal in sequence.

props.name: outputs
props.description: Maps each command index to the lines revealed after that command completes.

props.name: route
props.description: Prompt path shown before each command.

props.name: windowName
props.description: Title text shown inside the window pane.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the window chrome and prompt.

props.name: showWindowPane
props.description: Hides the window chrome when set to false.

props.name: windowNameAlign
props.description: Controls the alignment of the window title.

props.name: backgroundVariant
props.description: Chooses between a plain terminal body or a subtle gradient treatment.

props.name: playOnInView
props.description: Starts the playback only after the terminal enters the viewport.
